task.title: Renaming a data set or member

titlealts.navtitle: Renaming a data set or member
titlealts.searchtitle: Renaming a data set or member

task.shortdesc: When you rename a data set or member in an MVS subproject, it is also renamed on the remote system.

step.cmd: Select a data set or member in the view.
In the Rename Resource window, type a new name for the data set or member and click OK.
step.stepresult: The resource is renamed in the subproject and on the remote system. The rename action provides no indication that a change is made on the remote system. Even though there is no indication, the change is made and saved on the remote system in the original data set or member.
